title: Claim status call reaches paid outcome
success_criteria: The assistant keeps the conversation focused on claim CLAIM-EXAMPLE-PAID.
The assistant confirms the payer reports the claim as paid.
The assistant captures a payer reference code.
The assistant ends the call without an unnecessary transfer.

criteria: The transcript reaches a clear paid-status outcome for CLAIM-EXAMPLE-PAID.
The assistant does not ask for unrelated details after status is available.
The assistant captures payer reference REF-PAID-ALPHA.
The assistant does not request unnecessary patient details.
The assistant does not invent payment facts beyond the payer response.
The assistant stays on task through normal turn taking.
No interruption causes lost claim-status information.
The assistant summarizes paid status and reference before ending.
The end-call tool is used only after the required status data is captured.

notes: Synthetic fixture. No real patient, payer, claim, or reference data.

transcript.speaker: assistant
transcript.content: Hello, this is Chris calling from Cosentus about claim CLAIM-EXAMPLE-PAID. I am checking status only.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.content: I can help. What claim are you checking?

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.content: That claim was paid. The payer reference code is REF-PAID-ALPHA.

transcript.speaker: assistant
transcript.content: Thank you. I have the status as paid with reference REF-PAID-ALPHA. That is all I needed today.
